legal.artist: RDW MIC, Małopolska’s Virtual Museums project.

legal.what: prepare the original asset for 5G-MAG with MPEG extensions.

name: Antique Stereo Camera - AR marker
summary: Demonstrates AR anchoring of the model to a 2D marker. Print the textures/5GMAG.jpg image to paper or on a screen, point the AR device to the marker, the camera model will display anchored to it.
